meaning: vi.趴,匍匐,卑躬屈膝,五体投地的
examples: Were I such they would grovel at my feet.
To gawk and grovel and stare at Prince Ali!
That should have been enough to make Mr Khan grovel.
Never before, I said, could aspiring journalists write, shoot photos and video, produce and publish without having to grovel at the feet of an elite professional class wielding the spoils of power.
